description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow that builds PyInstaller artifacts for a release. The workflow triggers on published releases and runs on a matrix of Linux, macOS, and Windows environments. For each environment, it checks out the source code, caches pip and npm dependencies, sets up Python 3.12, installs APT dependencies on Linux, builds the executable using PyInstaller, zips the package, and publishes it to the release using the GITHUB_TOKEN.
